business.name: Aaron's Heating and Cooling
business.tagline: Fast, fair, and we show up when we say we will

hero.headline: When it's 94° inside, we answer at *9pm on Sunday*
hero.subheadline: Real HVAC help in Tallahassee. No runaround, no surprise charges, just your air working again.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Complete HVAC Services
services_section.subheading: From emergency repairs to full system replacements, we handle it all

services.title: Emergency AC Repair
services.description: When your AC quits in Florida heat, we show up fast. Sunday night, holiday weekend — we're answering the phone and fixing the problem.

services.title: HVAC System Installation
services.description: New units installed right the first time. We help you pick the right system and handle everything from permits to cleanup.

services.title: System Maintenance
services.description: Keep your HVAC running efficiently with regular tune-ups. We catch problems before they leave you sweating or freezing.

services.title: Heating Repair
services.description: Those rare cold Florida nights when your heat won't work — we get it running again quickly and at a reasonable price.

about.heading: Straight Talk About HVAC in Tallahassee
about.body: We're Aaron's Heating and Cooling, and we do HVAC the right way in Tallahassee. When we say we'll be there, we show up. When we give you a price, that's what you pay. No games, no surprises. Just honest work from people who live here too.

reviews.name: Ben C.
reviews.text: Aaron installed our new HVAC unit and was fantastic. He helped us choose the right system and even replaced rotted wood on the platform. Above and beyond work.

reviews.name: Jasmin P.
reviews.text: Super quick to schedule an appointment. Aaron got my 2010 unit running like new again at a very reasonable price. Highly recommend his services.

reviews.name: Pamela V.
reviews.text: No AC and 94° inside our house. Aaron was there within an hour of calling on a Sunday at 9pm! Fixed everything quickly with a great attitude.

reviews.name: Amanda W.
reviews.text: Very polite and do great work. When they found the job was bigger than expected, they refused to do it halfway. Got everything done right.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Tallahassee and Beyond
service_areas.subheading: Fast, reliable HVAC service throughout the area

cta.heading: Ready to Get Your Air Fixed?
cta.body: Don't sweat it out another day. Call now for fast, honest HVAC service in Tallahassee.
